---
title: "About Me"
---

A little about me, I love to travel and take photos of cool nature. Here are some of my favorite photos that I have taken.

![Sunset in Laguna Beach](docs/IMG_1813.jpg)

![Rocks in Joshua Tree National Park](docs/IMG_2010.jpg)

I have two dogs, Ollie and Buster. They are the cutest. Ollie, I like to take on long runs on the beach. Buster loves to go on a walk to Starbucks with me and get a pup cup.

![Ollie](docs/IMG_2671.jpg)


![Buster](docs/IMG_5019.jpg)


![Ollie and his friend Bodie and my friend Mia!](docs/IMG_0039.jpg)
